modules.head: A slimmer, stylish choice with substantial capacity

imgs.a: It shows the image of the interior of the washing machine

modules.head: Explore your new washer’s key features

imgs.a: It shows a wider interior of the washing machine
It shows that space utilization is possible with a slimmer size
It shows that ai is set according to the weight of the fabric and the performance of each type
It shows a quick wash with multi-directional spray

modules.head: Fit your washer into your life
modules.disc:
*Save 125mm of space compared to previous LG conventional front loader washing machines of 770mm depth

*Related images are for illustrative purposes only and may differ from the actual product

imgs.a: It shows the image of the interior of the washing machine

modules.head: Level up your laundry
modules.disc:
*Results may vary depending on the tester

*Vibration sensor included in 615/565 depth model only. (excluding Slim type)

*Friction Damper & Weight Balance's number may be different depending on the model.

*Related images are for illustrative purposes only and may differ from the actual product

imgs.a: He's standing with the finished laundry, and next to him, he's showing a larger image of the interior of the washing machine

modules.head: Take the guesswork out of washing and let AI DD™
modules.disc:
*Tested by Intertek on June 2023. AI Wash cycle with AI Class 1 with 3kg of Mixed clothes compared to Cotton cycle.

*Results may vary depending on the clothes and environment.

imgs.a: It shows that ai is set according to the weight of the fabric and the performance of each type

modules.head: Get Fresh Laundry in just 39 minutes
modules.disc:
*Tested by Intertek on May 2023. TurboWash39 cycle with 3kg of IEC load.

*Results may vary depending on the environment.

*Related images are for illustrative purposes only and may differ from the actual product

imgs.a: The woman is sitting at the table looking at her watch, and there is a washing machine behind her

modules.head: Experience Reduced Noise and Vibrations
modules.disc:
*The number of friction dampers and weight balances may vary depending on the model

*Related images are for illustrative purposes only and may differ from the actual product

imgs.a: The woman is sitting at a table reading a book and showing icons and washing machines that have less noise next to her

modules.head: Prioritize your health and tackle allergens
modules.disc:
*Allergy Care cycle tested by US Intertek reduces Live Dust Mites, Allergens (Dust Mite, Cat, Dog, Pollen), Bacteria, and Fungi.

*Results may vary depending on the environment.

imgs.a: A woman and a child are lying in bed smiling

modules.head: Wash and rinse away pet odors and stains
modules.disc:
*Tested by Intertek on March 2024. Pet care cycle with 1.5kg of cotton load and it removes 99% pet odors(Trimethylamine, Isovaleraldehyde, Acetic acid, Methyl mercaptan)

*Results may vary depending on the environment.

imgs.a: A woman and a dog are lying in bed

modules.head: Link your washing machine and smartphone
modules.body: Connect your washer to the LG ThinQ™ app to control the machine, select courses, and even start it while you're out and about with just the tap of a button.

imgs.a: The man is looking at the smartphone and is showing the screen and washing machine image of the smartphone next to him
A woman is looking at a smartphone. The icon next to her shows a smartphone screen
The woman is sitting on the sofa and the middle icon shows the voice recognition speaker.

specs.v: Dial + Full Touch Buttons & LED Display
